source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.

identity.name: Morphous Oat Panicle
identity.paletteMood: cream grain green stem soft grey

typography: Quiet English product typography with Noto Sans JP guidance for schedule labels, field-task names, table numerals, command search, status messaging, and compact Japanese scheduling UI.
layout: Airy 8px scheduling grids, slim panicle-line dividers, compact calendar and task density, low shadows, 8px cards and controls, oat-husk texture accents, and restrained light/dark surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent oat panicle motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an oat panicle botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: One graceful mature oat panicle with open branching drooping seedlets, cream grain husks, pale straw awns, green stems, soft grey glaucous bloom, and delicate field-bent geometry. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, natural fibrous grain texture, slim cool-field silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full panicle, branching stem, and several visible oat spikelets without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no wheat head, no barley, no rice, no corn, no dense bouquet, no field landscape, no vase, no hand, no props, no second subject, no text, no watermark, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Oat Panicle light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE source board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Oat Panicle" / "Oat Panicle". Use the oat panicle cutout visible in this conversation as source reference: open drooping seedlets, cream grain husks, pale straw awns, green stems, soft grey glaucous bloom, and cool-field botanical delicacy. The board must be a wide 4K-class design-system reference for a light scheduling system.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Oat Panicle, Oat Panicle, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from cream oat grain, green stems, pale straw awns, soft grey bloom, field paper, oat shadow, cool soil ink, and dry husk borders. The board must read as oat panicle, not wheat, barley, rice, generic beige UI, or generic enterprise UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 予定, 圃場, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, scheduling dashboard metric cards, calendar strip, timeline chart, workload bar chart, field-task table, schedule filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, oat husk and panicle-line texture swatches.
Style/medium: premium calm scheduling product design system, realistic shadcn/tweakcn UI mockup, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, cream grain paper surfaces, green-stem primary controls, soft grey focus rings, straw separators, cool soil text, subtle oat husk texture, airy scheduling density.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: cream grain, green stem, pale straw, soft grey bloom, field paper, husk tan, oat shadow, cool soil ink.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Oat Panicle", no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Oat Panicle dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Oat Panicle" / "Oat Panicle". It must feel like the same calm light scheduling system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the oat panicle motif and the visible light-mode board language.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Oat Panicle, Oat Panicle, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the oat panicle system language: cream grain highlights, green-stem controls, soft grey bloom focus/accent rings, pale straw separators, husk tan borders, field-paper text, oat-shadow muted states, cool-soil and husk-ink backgrounds, subtle oat husk texture, delicate panicle-line texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. It must read as oat panicle, not wheat, barley, rice, generic beige UI, or generic dark SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 予定, 圃場, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, scheduling dashboard metric cards, calendar strip, timeline chart, workload bar chart, field-task table, schedule filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, oat husk and panicle-line texture swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from cool soil ink and husk shadow, raised cards in dark oat grey, cream grain foreground text, green-stem primary controls, straw and husk accents, soft grey focus rings and charts, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls, subtle panicle texture overlays.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: cream grain, green stem, pale straw, soft grey bloom, field paper, husk tan, oat shadow, cool soil ink.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Oat Panicle", no illegible microtext.
